clue: Unfinished box pried open with force and skill!
explanation: CRAFT: skill. CRATE (box) is unfinished, giving CRAT. CRAT is pried open with F (force), to get CRAFT.
hints: We need another word for a box.
That word is unfinished, so remove the last letter.
In cryptics (as in physics equations), force can be represented by the letter F.
"Pried open with" is telling us to put that F inside what we've created so far.
The answer will be a word that means skill.
